title: lichen-rpl: DIO/DAO/DIS wire codec + TLV option parser
description: New lichen-rpl crate. messages.rs implements DIO (24-byte base + TLV options) and DAO (20-byte base with DODAGID + TLV options) codec matching the Python messages.py/dao.py wire format exactly. Parses/encodes RPL Target (type 5), Transit Information (type 6), DODAG Configuration (type 4). Tests use hand-computed vectors.
